calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:37:17 a.m. and concluding at 9:56:11 a.m.

Andrew Silva Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Ocean Park Development, LLC via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Envision 4 Integrated Technology not appearing.

HENRY CHEN is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

HENRY CHEN is examined by the Court.
The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ocean Park Development, LLC , and against Defendant Envision 4 Integrated Technology, as follows:

1. Damages: $182,821.71
2. Prejudgment Interest: $84,849.31

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $267,671.02

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit Judgment for review and signature. (D505)
